calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Carol Karen, CSR#8189. (514)

Robert Cohen, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC., dba CAB-LCF.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ZHU HUA LIU, aka ZHUHUA LIU, aka ZHU H. LIU, aka CINDY LEE; JONG CHOI, aka JUNG Y. CHOI, aka JESSE CHOI.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered declarations filed in support of Request for Default Prove-up are admitted in evidence.
Martin Romero sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $28,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $9,632.00
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $665.08
Total Judgment in the amount of $41,122.08
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2013 Continued To Dec-18-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Continued To Aug-21-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
